fldWEOKBFn4xJuhCE.name: # of Nights Within the Last 7 Days

options.formula:
IF(
  AND(
    IS_AFTER({fldim9iNKCObnZE1j}, DATEADD(TODAY(), -7, 'days')),
    IS_BEFORE({fldim9iNKCObnZE1j}, TODAY())
  ),
  MIN(
    DATETIME_DIFF({fldYVG4qt1pfCP4j9}, {fldim9iNKCObnZE1j}, 'days'),
    DATETIME_DIFF(TODAY(), {fldim9iNKCObnZE1j}, 'days')
  ),
  0
)

fldqHRjFXEaHI4u5V.name: # of Nights Within the Last 30 Days

options.formula:
IF(
    AND(
        IS_AFTER({fldim9iNKCObnZE1j}, DATEADD(TODAY(), -30, 'days')),
        IS_BEFORE({fldim9iNKCObnZE1j}, TODAY()),
        {fldirmGnYCuZ5SHBE} > 0
    ),
    MIN(
        {fldirmGnYCuZ5SHBE},
        30 - DATETIME_DIFF(TODAY(), {fldim9iNKCObnZE1j}, 'days')
    ),
    BLANK()
)

    ),

        90 - DATETIME_DIFF(TODAY(), {fldim9iNKCObnZE1j}, 'days')
    ),

)

)

  REGEX_MATCH({fldtFfU62s49p84mI}, "[A-Z]{2}"),
  SWITCH(
    UPPER({fldtFfU62s49p84mI}),
    "IL", "Israel",
    "GB", "United Kingdom",
    "TH", "Thailand",
    "CZ", "Czech Republic",
    "FR", "France",

    "CH", "Switzerland",
    "HU", "Hungary",
    "ES", "Spain",
    "MK", "Macedonia",
    "",
    UPPER({fldtFfU62s49p84mI})
  ),
  IF(
    REGEX_MATCH({fldtFfU62s49p84mI}, "(,|\\s)[A-Z][a-z]+(\\s+[A-Z][a-z]+)*,?\\s+[A-Z][a-z]+(\\s+[A-Z][a-z]+)*$"),
    TRIM(REGEX_EXTRACT({fldtFfU62s49p84mI}, "\\b([A-Z][a-z]+(?:\\s+[A-Z][a-z]+)*)$")),
    IF(
      REGEX_MATCH({fldtFfU62s49p84mI}, "(,|\\s)[A-Z]{2}(\\s|$)"),
      SWITCH(
        UPPER(REGEX_EXTRACT({fldtFfU62s49p84mI}, "(,|\\s)([A-Z]{2})(\\s|$)")),
        "IL", "Israel",
        "GB", "United Kingdom",
        "TH", "Thailand",
        "CZ", "Czech Republic",
        "FR", "France",
        "PL", "Poland",
        "NL", "Netherlands",

        "ES", "Spain",
        "MK", "Macedonia",
        ""
      ),
      TRIM({fldtFfU62s49p84mI})
    )
  )
)

options.formula:
IF(
  FIND(",", {fldtFfU62s49p84mI}) > 0,
  IF(
    FIND(",", {fldtFfU62s49p84mI}, FIND(",", {fldtFfU62s49p84mI}) + 1) > 0,
    TRIM(
      MID(
        {fldtFfU62s49p84mI},
        FIND(",", {fldtFfU62s49p84mI}) + 1,
        FIND(",", {fldtFfU62s49p84mI}, FIND(",", {fldtFfU62s49p84mI}) + 1) - FIND(",", {fldtFfU62s49p84mI}) - 1
      )
    ),
    ""
  ),
  ""
)

DATETIME_DIFF(
  DATETIME_PARSE(
    MID({fldGbsJ1orGpjriWd}, FIND(", ", {fldGbsJ1orGpjriWd}) + 2, 10),
    'YYYY-MM-DD'
  ),
  DATETIME_PARSE(
    LEFT({fldGbsJ1orGpjriWd}, FIND(", ", {fldGbsJ1orGpjriWd}) - 1),
    'YYYY-MM-DD'
  ),
  'days'
)

The listed categories are examples only:

prompt:
You are an expert in project management and automation, specializing in recommending scenario prioritization for industries based on desired outcomes and task complexity. Your tone should be professional and insightful.

Task description:
Analyze the provided industry details and related scenarios to determine which scenarios should be prioritized. Consider the desired outcomes and specific task complexities of each scenario. Use your expertise to recommend scenarios that will provide the greatest time savings and impact for a busy business owner.

Output format:
Provide a list of recommended scenarios to prioritize, formatted as plain text with each scenario on a new line. Do not include any additional text or explanations. If unable to make a recommendation, output "No recommendation available."

Context and Data:
Industry:

You are an expert project management assistant specializing in automation scenarios for busy business owners. Your role is to analyze the complexity and desired outcomes of specific tasks within a focus area to suggest prioritization.

Task description:
Evaluate the scenarios associated with the given focus area. Consider the complexity of each specific task and the desired outcomes. Determine which scenarios should be prioritized based on potential time savings and impact on the business.

Output format:
Provide a concise prioritization suggestion as plain text. List the scenarios in order of priority, from highest to lowest, based on your analysis. Do not include any additional text or explanation. If you cannot determine a prioritization, output "Unable to determine prioritization."

Context and Data:
Focus Area Name:
